---

### SUMMARY
All 9 non-deals HTML files in `pages/ba/` have been updated: the single "Deals & Pipeline" sidebar link was replaced with an expandable section containing "Equity Flow" and "M&A Flow" sub-items. 8 files were edited via single-line `edit_file`; dashboard.html required RLM-based git restore + substitution due to its multi-line variant and Windows `\r\n` line endings. An indentation doubling bug (40 spaces on the first `<div>` line) was fixed across all 8 single-line files. No old-style Deals links remain in any of the 9 files.

### EVIDENCE
- `pages/ba/crm.html:74-80` — expandable section present with correct 20-space indentation on the wrapping `<div>`
- `pages/ba/crm-detail.html:93-99` — same structure confirmed via grep
- `pages/ba/dashboard.html:108-114` — restored from git via RLM, expandable section cleanly applied
- `pages/ba/dataroom.html:132-138` — confirmed via grep
- `pages/ba/mandates.html:120-126` — confirmed via grep
- `pages/ba/payments.html:87-93` — confirmed via grep
- `pages/ba/reports.html:87-93` — confirmed via grep
- `pages/ba/settings.html:86-92` — confirmed via grep (note: settings.html had the Deals link on same line as mandates, no blank line before)
- `pages/ba/team.html:123-129` — confirmed via grep
- `grep_files` for old-style single-line Deals links across all 9 files returned **0 matches**
- `grep_files` for `toggleSidebarSection('deals-section')` across all 9 files returned **9 matches** (one per file)

### CHANGES
- `pages/ba/crm.html` — replaced single-line Deals link with expandable section; fixed indentation
- `pages/ba/crm-detail.html` — replaced single-line Deals link with expandable section; fixed indentation
- `pages/ba/dashboard.html` — restored from git HEAD via RLM, then replaced multi-line Deals block with expandable section
- `pages/ba/dataroom.html` — replaced single-line Deals link with expandable section; fixed indentation
- `pages/ba/mandates.html` — replaced single-line Deals link with expandable section; fixed indentation
- `pages/ba/payments.html` — replaced single-line Deals link with expandable section; fixed indentation
- `pages/ba/reports.html` — replaced single-line Deals link with expandable section; fixed indentation
- `pages/ba/settings.html` — replaced single-line Deals link with expandable section; fixed indentation
- `pages/ba/team.html` — replaced single-line Deals link with expandable section; fixed indentation

### RISKS
- **`toggleSidebarSection` JS function dependency**: The new buttons call `toggleSidebarSection('deals-section')`. This function must exist in each page's JS (or a shared script). If missing, the expand/collapse won't work. Mitigation: verify the function is present in all 9 files or loaded from a shared include.
- **deals.html already modified**: `pages/ba/deals.html` shows a large pre-existing diff (1402→1476 lines) unrelated to this task. The `?flow=equity` and `?flow=ma` query parameters in the new sidebar links assume `deals.html` will handle them. If the deals.html rewrite changes query-param handling, the sub-item links may not work as intended.
- **settings.html sidebar structure**: settings.html had the Deals link immediately after Mandates without a blank separator line (unlike other files). The replacement preserved this structure correctly, but the visual consistency differs slightly from other pages.

### BLOCKERS
None.

agents.result:
### SUMMARY

Applied both changes across all 4 role-specific `deals.html` files. Removed the inline Equity/M&A flow selector tab cards (flow switching is now handled via sidebar URL params). Replaced the static 6-card KPI grid with two flow-dependent 4-card KPI sections — one for Equity (Total Equity Deals, Active Investees, Matched Investors, Avg. Deal Size) and one for M&A (Total M&A Deals, Active Sellers, Matched Buyers, Avg. Deal Value) — with the M&A section hidden by default. Updated `switchFlow()` to toggle KPI container visibility and `renderDashboardFlow()` to populate KPI values from `db.deals`.

### EVIDENCE

- `pages/superadmin/deals.html:211` — flow selector removed, replaced by empty line
- `pages/superadmin/deals.html:223-260` — new flow-dependent KPI cards with `id="kpi-equity"` (visible) and `id="kpi-ma"` (hidden)
- `pages/superadmin/deals.html:917-937` — `switchFlow()` now toggles `#kpi-equity` and `#kpi-ma` visibility; old button-styling code removed
- `pages/superadmin/deals.html:964-997` — `renderDashboardFlow()` now populates 8 KPI elements from `db.deals`
- `grep_files` "Flow Option Switchers" → 0 matches across all 4 files (confirmed removal)
- `grep_files` "flow-btn-equity\|flow-btn-ma\|flow-icon-ma\|flow-title-ma" → 0 matches (no stale DOM refs)
- `grep_files` "kpi-equity-total" → 8 matches (HTML id + JS `getElementById` in all 4 files)

### CHANGES

- `pages/superadmin/deals.html` — removed flow selector buttons; replaced KPI section with flow-dependent dual 4-card grids; updated `switchFlow()` and `renderDashboardFlow()`
- `pages/admin/deals.html` — same 4 changes as superadmin
- `pages/ib/deals.html` — same 4 changes as superadmin
- `pages/ba/deals.html` — same 4 changes as superadmin

### RISKS

- **KPI data dependency on `amountNumeric` field**: The Avg Deal Size/Value KPI reads `d.amountNumeric` for numeric averaging and appends `'M'` suffix. If the `db.deals` seed data doesn't have `amountNumeric` on every deal object, the average will display `'0'`. Mitigation: ensure `amountNumeric` is present on all deal records or add a fallback parser for the `amount` string field.
- **`renderDashboardFlow` called before DOM ready**: The KPI population in `renderDashboardFlow` accesses DOM elements by ID. If `window.onload` fires `renderDashboardFlow()` before the KPI HTML is parsed, `getElementById` will return null. Not observed as a real issue since the script block is at the bottom of the body, but worth verifying during integration testing.
- **No regression tests run**: HTML-only files with embedded JS have no automated test suite. Manual browser verification across all 4 roles is recommended.

### BLOCKERS

None.
